name: Crumbed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling salted water until tender.
2. Use the tip of a sharp knife to test for doneness instead of a fork.
3. Drain the potatoes and return them to heat to dry any remaining liquid.
4. Mix the remaining ingredients together.
5. Add the mixture to the potatoes.
6. Shake the saucepan or toss to coat evenly.
Serves 8
